trip.pageSubtitle: Litochoro, Mt Olympus, Athens and Naxos

adventureDay.pdesc: Newark to Dublin – UA 23, Stayed an extra day in Dublin before heading to Zurich overnight.  Arrived Monday morning for the Tuesday meeting.  Stayed at the Marker on the Grand Canal

adventureDay.h3: Flight: LX 1850 from ZRH to SKG
adventureDay.pdesc: I arrived late on Thursday and stayed in the hotel in the airport for an early flight on Friday meeting Kathy Mike and Karen for our flight to Thessaloniki.  We found our rental cars and the Smythes.  From there we were on to Litchoro

adventureDay.h3: Arriving in Thessalonki and driving to Litchorio
adventureDay.pdesc: We all arrived in Thessaloniki.  Tim and Sarah from Paris, Kathy, Mike, Karen, Jodi and Stephen.  We take the van get in our two rental cars and drive to Vassos farm
We visisted two of the mountain-top monasteries in Metorea

adventureDay.h3: Mt Olympus presented quite a challenge to our group of sixty somethings
adventureDay.pdesc: The trip up to the refuge was uneventful.  Long stretches of steep turain.  We had dinner at the refuge and went to bed to prepare for a long day on Monday

adventureDay.h3: I always wanted to be helicoptered off a mountain
adventureDay.pdesc: Leaving the refuge by around 6:30AM we were trudging uphill along a long ridge that climbed steadily once we were above the tree line.   The top of the mountain was covered in clouds so once we reached the xxxx I decided to top try and go to the very peak.  The rocks were wet from the clouds and there was not going to be a view.  I headed down before the others to catch up with Kathy, who had left the refuge about an hour before I arrived back there.   I caught up with her with a mile or two to get back to our car so i went ahead and was able to pull the car up to the trailhead and meet her coming down.   The others, Vassos, Mike, Karen Jodi and Stephen were still on the mountain and as I realized they still had not reached the refuge because Karen slid off the edge of an switch-back and had broken her leg.  After the helicopter brought Karen to the hospital the remaining hikers walked down in the dark and arrived around midnight
We left the farm and spent the afternoon in Delphi with a guide at the museum and grounds.

adventureDay.h1title: Drive to Athens arrive mid-afternoon Drop rental cars
adventureDay.h3: Athens and the search for a gas station
adventureDay.pdesc: Arriving in Athens we spent a ridiculous amount of time looking for a gas station before dropping off the rental cars.  By early afternoon we were checked into our Marriott hotel and walking around the neighborhood
A tour guide took us thru the Parthenon and the Acropolis Museum
We had a chance to see some of the other islands as we went to Naxos

adventureDay.h1title: Beach Day in Naxos with an evening tour
adventureDay.pdesc: Our first true relaxing day.  The planned electric bike tri was cancelled.

We were on the catameran by 8 am and toured the island from the boat with swimming an option most of us exercied.  We had a bit of rain during the trip but were all able to squeeze into the cabin.  Blue skies returned and we were back on land by 3pm.  From there we had some additional sight seeing before returning to the hotel.
With our now familiar bus driver we got a great tour of the island with stops at a pottery maker and gardens for coffee.  We ended our day with a great sunset outside our hotel.
Quick tour and back to the Ferry and Athens
